name: Adhunik Bangla Hotel
overview: Discover the enchanting world of Adhunik Bangla Hotel, an anthology series that serves up a tantalizing array of authentic Bangla cuisine infused with fantasy, psychological horror and mythology, where each story unveils a new dish that will leave you craving for more.

trailers.title: Adhunik Bangla Hotel | Official Trailer | Chorki Original Series | Mosharraf Karim | Kazi Asad
